positive: A stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) portrait, designed as a cohesive apparel graphic. The fox should have flowing, luminous tails and a graceful, mystical appearance. Composition must feature a strong central silhouette of the fox emerging from a nebula-like background of swirling amethyst, sapphire, and gold cosmic dust. Incorporate abstract geometric mandalas and celestial symbols (like crescent moons and stars) subtly woven around the central figure. The style should be highly intricate, neo-sacred geometry combined with vaporwave aesthetics, utilizing extreme contrast (deep blacks and vibrant neons). Lighting should be dramatic, simulating bioluminescent glow emanating from the fox and the surrounding nebulae. Print-friendly, flat graphic quality, vector art style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, text, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg compression, noise, low detail, photorealism, 3d rendering, bokeh
